rationale: Bug hunt on C14 boost_weight code (merlin_card_system.gd): _get_card_factions correctly iterates options→effects, _get_faction_boost checks threshold with proper default, weighted selection in get_fastroute_card and _generate_event_card uses correct cumulative roll — 0 bugs. Added WALK phase enum, wire_walk()/disconnect_walk() methods, walk_ended signal in BroceliandeForest3D with GFC-aware emission + standalone fallback.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C15 (game_flow_controller.gd walk wiring + broceliande walk_ended). Then feature: run_history population (q-20260415-002) or biome walk event pools.
